title: Kummi Paattu
desc: Consumed by extreme rage, a young man rapes his step-brother's fiancée. However, she decides to forgive him and supports him overcoming his troubles.

title: Pasupathi Mey/Paa Rasakka Palayam
desc: Pasupathy, whose world revolves around his mother, comes to Chennai and gets a job at a police station. When his mother needs heart surgery, he's ready to go to any length to raise the required funds.

title: Nayagan
desc: A man who witnesses the gruesome murder of his father kills a corrupt policeman and flees to Mumbai to become a gangster.

title: Santhitha Velai
desc: During a trip, Aadalarasu meets his ailing doppelganger, Thirunaavukkarasu, who puts forth a request. After the latter's death, Aadalarasu sets out to fulfil the promise he made to his lookalike.

title: Annai Kalikambal
desc: Two sisters, Parvathi and Eshwari, are devotees of Goddess Kaaligaambaal. When their aunt is told that the birth of Eshwari's baby will cause her death, she lays out an evil plan.
